metadata.description: Downloads secret scanning alerts and their locations from GitHub, optionally applies a user-provided handler to remediate secrets in local files, and resolves alerts on GitHub.
metadata.insight: Insight: Automating secret remediation reduces mean-time-to-resolution and prevents secrets from persisting in codebases after detection.
metadata.improves: Secret scanning alert hygiene and credential rotation compliance
formula: Alert fetched = open secret scanning alerts via GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/secret-scanning/alerts?state=open
Handler result = handler(alert, location, context) → { action: fixed|skipped|error }
Auto-resolve eligible = alerts where ALL locations returned action=fixed
Resolved on GitHub = PATCH /repos/{owner}/{repo}/secret-scanning/alerts/{n} with state=resolved
